title: 3 Great Anime Movies From the Last 6 Years That Nobody Talks About
content: It’s a great time to be someone who enjoys anime movies. After all, some of the best anime films of the 2020s are breaking records and accumulating massive mainstream hype. Just look at the recent theatrical runs for Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle and Chainsaw Man – The Movie: Reze Arc .
author: ComicBook

title: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth Game's Trailer for Switch 2, Xbox Series X|S Reveals Demo
content: Square Enix revealed on Tuesday in a new trailer for the Nintendo Switch 2 and Xbox Series X|S releases of its Final Fantasy VII Rebirth sequel game that a demo has launched. Demo save data transfers to the full game. The game will launch for Switch 2, Xbox X|S and Xbox on PC on June 3.
author: ANN

title: Jujutsu Kaisen’s Sequel Leaves Its Cliffhanger Ending Unresolved
content: Warning: This article contains spoilers from the Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo manga! The sequel manga, Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo , written by Gege Akutami and illustrated by Yuji Iwasaki, reached its conclusion after the conflict between the humans and the Simurians ended.
author: ComicBook

title: 44 Years Later, Studio Ghibli Brings Back Hayao Miyazaki’s Classic Manga
content: Hayao Miyazaki is one of the most celebrated anime directors in Japanese history, known for taking his films to a global audience. He is also the first anime director to win the Academy Awards, and his films remain iconic even decades after their release.
author: ComicBook

title: 5 Anime Characters So Great, We Don’t Mind That They’re Overpowered
content: There are plenty of overpowered anime characters, but some wear it better than others. We’ve all heard complaints about characters so strong or smart that they’re seemingly unbeatable. In protagonists, this can lower the stakes, causing every challenge to feel underwhelming — because we know they’ll overcome it.
author: ComicBook

title: Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo Disappoints With Final Release As Major Character’s Fate Remains Unknown
content: Warning: This article contains spoilers from the Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo manga! After six months of serialization, the Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo manga written by Gege Akutami and illustrated by Yuji Iwasaki reached its conclusion in March 2026.
author: ComicBook

title: Following Kagurabachi, These Three Shonen Series Should Finally Get Anime Adaptations
content: The anime adaptation of Kagurabachi has been one of the most anticipated adaptations ever since the series released its first chapter. The hype surrounding the manga has always been massive, and the news of its anime adaptation is exciting for fans.
author: ComicBook

title: North American Anime, Manga Releases, April 26-May 2
content: Anime Releases Print Manga Releases Digital Manga Releases Print Novel Releases Digital Novel Releases Audiobooks Video Game Releases
author: ANN

title: Sonic x Godzilla Crossover Releases First Trailer
content: Godzilla has had a long history of crossovers in his history, having tangled with the likes of Kong, Neon Genesis Evangelion , and even the Marvel Universe. Later this year, the King of the Monsters is planning to tangle with a speedy threat that is quite unique when compared to the other challenges the kaiju has…
author: ComicBook

title: KPop Demon Hunters Controversy Erupts From Recent Event
content: KPop Demon Hunters is set to return with a sequel following the smash success of the animated musical on Netflix, but the second chapter is still years away. Luckily, Huntrix is still finding new ways to stay in the headlines, though the latest is a news bite that many might not have seen coming.
author: ComicBook
